---
title: "R Packages"
subtitle: "Useful packages for data collation & cleaning"
listing:
  contents: packages
  type: default
  image-align: left
  image-height: 100px
  date-format: medium
  categories: true
  page-size: 9
  fields: [image, author, title, description, date]
title-block-banner-color: body
page-layout: full
theme: cosmo
format: 
  html:
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 250px
      body-width: 1000px
      margin-width: 200px
---
